results.title: Vance, Rubio take different paths on Trump’s foreign policy agenda as 2028 Republican rivalry emerges
results.description: Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio appear to be pursuing different approaches to President Donald Trump’s national security agenda, as the two potential 2028 Republican presidential contenders navigate influence and policy within a divided GOP. Despite publicly showing unity, the contrast between the two officials has become increasingly visible, particularly over [...] The post Vance, Rubio take different paths on Trump’s foreign policy agenda as 2028 Republican rivalry emerges appeared first on ANC .

results.title: PM Modi Greets Former Vice President Venkaiah Naidu On Birthday
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Union Home Minister Amit Shah extended warm birthday wishes to former Vice President Shri Venkaiah Naidu, commending his lifelong dedication to national development, agriculture, and rural upliftment.
